verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Evening — 17:00
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

best.windFit: WNW 10 km/h · cross-onshore · poor wind fit
best.bestWind: ideal E/ENE/ESE, usable NE/SE, clean <=22 km/h

photo.alt: Photo of Rey Cortiço surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 56 kJ, 9 s period, lully 39/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 6-9s at low tide can still work on Belgas if the sandbars are lined up, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 43 kJ, 14 s period, lully 22/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 14s+ at low tide is too close to closeout territory on exposed beaches, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot; 14s+ at low tide is too close to closeout territory on exposed beaches.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide makes this one less convincing.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 43 kJ, 9 s period, lully 38/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind; 6-9s at low tide can still make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia punchy.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size; Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.
warnings: Cerro looks below your bodyboard fun size
Cerro may feel too soft without more push

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 31 kJ, 9 s period, lully 13/100, and wind is the main risk.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot; 6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide makes the reef a bit less forgiving.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot
6-9s at low tide is too shallow and dangerous over the reef shelves
